result:
**Phase 2 complete.** Build verified successfully.

**What changed in `AssessmentIntroView.swift`:**
- Icon now appears with a scale-up entrance + `.symbolEffect(.variableColor.iterative.reversing)` sparkle animation
- Header text uses `TypingText` (typewriter effect), starts after icon settles (~0.8s delay)
- Description text uses `TypingText`, starts after header completes
- Time estimate and "Take the first step" button fade in only after all typewriter text finishes
- Hidden placeholder texts preserve layout space before typewriter starts, preventing layout shift
- Navigation logic (`showAssessment = true`) unchanged
